question: What text is embroidered on the black duffel bag filled with stacks of cash? A. SIGNAL JAM DETECTED B. UNAUTHORIZED TRANSMISSION C. SPACEBALLS THE NEW ONE D. SPACEBALLS THE MONEY
What year appears in the glowing white release date text?
What is the color of the hooded robe worn by the figure with dark, textured skin?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A humanoid figure with dark textured skin wears a green hooded robe near a spacecraft and large planet. A television test pattern displays dark red liquid dripping over text reading SIGNAL JAM DETECTED. An elderly man with white hair wears a black suit jacket and red pocket square while raising both hands near a black piano.

question: Which of the previously seen objects is back on screen? A. black duffel bag with white embroidered text B. black grand piano with glossy finish C. green leafy potted plant D. elderly man with white hair
Did the video show BOTH a spacecraft with blue engines AND an elderly man in a suit? A. Only spacecraft shown B. Only man shown C. Both spacecraft and man shown D. Neither shown
In the opening segment with the dark grey boxy spacecraft, where is the large dark spherical planet positioned within the frame? A. behind B. below C. left D. right
In the segment where the elderly man moves his hands outward and upward, where is the black piano located relative to him? A. left B. right C. behind D. below
What action is the elderly man with white hair performing? A. flying B. speaking C. emitting D. displayed
Describe the sequence of visual events and scene changes shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0 seconds, a spacecraft flies past a large planet; at 4 seconds, a robed creature speaks near the planet; at 10 seconds, a color bar test pattern with dripping liquid appears; at 14 seconds, an elderly man in a suit gestures inside a room.

question: Has the elderly man begun gesturing with his hands?

What change occurs in this video segment? A. The elderly man in the black suit moves his hands closer to his chest. B. The elderly man in the black suit begins speaking and gesturing. C. The scene disappears and all actions cease. D. The elderly man in the black suit moves his hands outward and upward.

How has the text overlay changed from the initial test pattern to the later frames? A. It disappeared completely. B. It changed to read "CONNECTION LOST". C. It added a second line reading "UNAUTHORIZED TRANSMISSION". D. It switched from purple to red font only.
What appears on the screen following the unauthorized transmission warning?
canonical_answer: An elderly man in a black suit speaks in front of a piano.

question: Which action occurs immediately before the screen displays 'SIGNAL JAM DETECTED'? A. An elderly man gestures with a bag of money B. A creature turns its head slightly to the right C. A spacecraft flies near a large planet D. An elderly man speaks in front of a piano
What appears on screen after the 'SIGNAL JAM DETECTED' test pattern? A. An elderly man in a suit B. The green-robed creature from earlier C. The spacecraft from the beginning D. A blank black screen
Where did the spacecraft launch from before entering this scene? A. Moon base B. Unable to answer C. Mars colony D. Earth orbit station

Given what is visible so far, could the elderly man with white hair adjust his pocket square? A. Yes — he is wearing a suit jacket with a visible red pocket square and his hands are visible B. No — he is not wearing a suit jacket C. No — no pocket square is visible on his person D. No — his hands are not visible
